properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Could You be healer To a heart that's been wounded? In a battle that's never seen Could You be teacher To a mind of confusion? Tell me what does this all mean

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Are You deliverer Of an imprisoned feeling in chains Can You set my spirit free And just one more question Allow me this question Could You be Messiah to me? Could You be Messiah to me?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Could You be father To a soul that's been abandoned? By a world too busy to hear Could You be friend To a helpless survivor? Can You take away my fears

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I heard them all sharing This newfound conviction in them Are You all that they make You to be?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And just one more question Allow me this question Could You be Messiah? Please be Messiah to me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Now I've been looking for someone like You And I'm so tired, I'm tired I've read every book, and I've sung every song My mind maybe right, but my heart feels so wrong Tell me how much further can my life go along Which way do the roads lead, where do I belong?

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Are You forgiver Of my most unknown secrets? Provider of all that I need Could You be brother? The one who knows better Would You now stand in the lead

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: When all this is over, all the thunder and lightning In the daylight just what will I see The answers to my questions, to all of my questions Could You be Messiah to me? Could You be Messiah to me? Could You be Messiah? Please be Messiah to me
